---
name: 📻 New Signal Request
about: Request the addition of a new RF signal type/protocol to the library
title: '[Signal Request]: '
labels: signal-library
assignees: ''
---

### 📡 Signal Overview
* **Signal Name / Protocol**: (e.g. Heltec V3 LoRa, Somfy RTS)
* **Approximate Center Frequency**: (e.g. 433.92 MHz)
* **Expected Occupied Bandwidth**: (e.g. 125 kHz)
* **Underlying Modulation**: (e.g. CSS, FSK, OOK, ASK)

### 📊 Physical Layer Details (if known)
* **Symbol/Baud Rate**: (e.g. 9600 baud)
* **Preamble/Sync Word**: (e.g. Preamble 0101... with sync 0x542C)
* **Usage/Context**: (e.g. Smart home remote, agricultural sensor)

### 💾 Sample Capture (Optional but Highly Recommended)
* If you have a sample IQ file or SigMF recording, please link or attach it.
* **Sample Rate used for capture**: (e.g. 2.0 MSPS)
* **Format**: (e.g. `cf32_le` complex float, `ci16_le` complex int16)

### 🌐 References & Community Links
* Link to sigidwiki.com, fccid.io, or other protocol documentation if available.
